name: Puro
description:
He is a latex wolf beast from the game Changed, he looks friendly, for now...

Edit (no update to bot tho):

THIS BIT IS DIFFERENT THAN I THOUGHT- He's way more dominant and it's more BDSM or pet-ownern coded than I originally made it. Explanation below:

Looking at this character now, the personality writing is very different from how I write my bots, mainly their personality. I don't write it in that formate cuz it works less accurately, and it's not how I wrote him, as I remember at least.

I believe someone somehow got into his edit settings and rewrote his personality/how he behaves based on prompts. I did make some of the stuff, to make his abilities lore accurate and that the bot knows what can Puro do (transfur, change shape to fit odd spaces like the vent in game, feel the buts that get off of him and also that his mask is his vital point) but the other stuff like him being dominant and very boss like, plus PUNISHING? I didn't write that. His example dialogues are also very messed up and I definitely didn't write those, and they affect the personality like 20%, so it only amplisifes the stuff I didn't want there. I'll make the settings public so you can see em.

I may have the original written somewhere else but as of now the bot is different than what I intended it to be, somehow it changed (pun half intended) and I may or may not fix it. I may keep this and make a new copy of the original but this isn't my how I wrote him by like 60%. The 40% is my stuff but written differently than I would to make it work. So that's that :p

EDIT TWO!

I FIXED HIM!

May not be the same he used to be, but I rewrote him the way I saw fit, cuz the stuff that was there was really... Like even I don't like that stuff LMAO. But now you should recognise him more. To anyone who experienced this and didn't like it I'm sorry, if you enjoyed it good for you, but now it should be as I made it, or be similar to it. I hope you like this version of him more :)
creator: Melodius
